mapper.select: SELECT id, alert_id, alert_no, alert_type, alert_type_name, alert_level, person_id, person_name, person_type, control_level, longitude, latitude, location_desc, probability, predict_time, prediction_id, prediction_batch, trigger_reason, sensitive_area_name, sensitive_area_type, crowd_count, target_person_count, nearby_police_ids, status, status_name, handle_remark, handle_officer_id, handle_officer_name, handle_time, police_station_code, police_station_name, extra_data, create_time, update_time FROM prediction_alert WHERE alert_id = #{alertId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, alert_id, alert_no, alert_type, alert_type_name, alert_level, person_id, person_name, longitude, latitude, location_desc, probability, predict_time, status, status_name, create_time, update_time FROM prediction_alert WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY alert_level DESC, create_time DESC

SELECT id, alert_id, alert_no, alert_type, alert_type_name, alert_level, person_id, person_name, longitude, latitude, location_desc, probability, predict_time, status, status_name, create_time, update_time FROM prediction_alert WHERE person_id = #{personId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT id, alert_id, alert_no, alert_type, alert_type_name, alert_level, person_id, person_name, longitude, latitude, location_desc, probability, predict_time, status, status_name, police_station_code, police_station_name, create_time FROM prediction_alert WHERE status IN (0, 1) AND alert_level >= #{alertLevel} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY alert_level DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT 50
mapper.update: UPDATE prediction_alert pa INNER JOIN aggregation_alert aa ON ST_Distance_Sphere(POINT(pa.longitude, pa.latitude), POINT(aa.center_longitude, aa.center_latitude)) <= 500 AND aa.create_time BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) AND NOW() AND aa.deleted = 0 SET pa.crowd_count = aa.total_person_count, pa.target_person_count = aa.target_person_count, pa.alert_level = CASE WHEN aa.total_person_count >= 50 THEN GREATEST(pa.alert_level, 4) WHEN aa.total_person_count >= 30 THEN GREATEST(pa.alert_level, 3) WHEN aa.total_person_count >= 15 THEN GREATEST(pa.alert_level, 2) ELSE pa.alert_level END, pa.update_time = NOW() WHERE pa.status IN (0, 1) AND pa.crowd_count = 0 AND pa.deleted = 0
